name: Zhuangzi

skills.name: Nature's Will
skills.description: Periodically removes crowd control effects and increases Movement Speed and damage reduction.

skills.name: Kaleidoscope
skills.description: Triggers Nature's Will, releasing dream butterflies in a fan-shaped area, inflicting damage and slowing enemies in range.

skills.name: Sleep Starts
skills.description: Deals damage to enemies in range and increases ally Movement Speed Grants a stack each time dealing damage, up to 5 stacks. Each stack increases skill damage. Passive: Periodically casts Sleep Starts.

skills.name: Butterfly Effect
skills.description: Removes crowd controls from allies within range and increases shield.

tips: Zhuangzi is a Easy Tank (Roaming) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier A with 49.9% win rate and 0.7% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
Best build path: Boots of Fortitude → Glacial Buckler → Ominous Premonition → Longnight Guardian → Overlord's Platemail.
Run Fate for stats that match Zhuangzi's Tank kit. Take Smite & Heal — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
Standard trade: Kaleidoscope → Sleep Starts → Butterfly Effect → reposition. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for maximum damage and passive value.
Laning: Help marksman crash wave, then rotate mid for picks. Return before Tyrant if your carry has no escape.
Teamfight: Engage on enemy carry when your team has follow-up. Body-block skillshots for your marksman.
Zhuangzi excels into Cirrus, Dian Wei, Menki. Avoid blind picking into Allain, Wukong, Musashi without team peel.

Zhuangzi is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 49.9% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick. Ban rate 1.1% — expect Zhuangzi to be removed in tryhard lobbies; have a backup in the same role.

faqs.question: Is Zhuangzi good in the current meta?
faqs.answer: Zhuangzi is Tier A Tank with 49.9% win rate, 0.7% pick rate, and 1.1% ban rate on Honor of Kings Global (Camp HOK, 2026-06-05). Solid situational pick.

faqs.question: What is the best Zhuangzi build?
faqs.answer: Core item path: Boots of Fortitude, Glacial Buckler, Ominous Premonition, Longnight Guardian, Overlord's Platemail. Run Fate arcana with Smite & Heal. Switch to alternate build presets on this page for jungle, clash, or late-game setups.

faqs.question: How to counter Zhuangzi?
faqs.answer: Pick Allain, Wukong, Musashi into Zhuangzi. Deny Roaming resources early and force fights before Zhuangzi completes core items. Zhuangzi struggles when the enemy can out-range or out-sustain them.

faqs.question: Who does Zhuangzi counter?
faqs.answer: Zhuangzi is strong into Cirrus, Dian Wei, Menki according to HoKStats matchup data and role matchups on the global server. Draft Zhuangzi when the enemy relies on these heroes in the Roaming lane.

faqs.question: Is Zhuangzi good in high rank / Diamond+?
faqs.answer: Zhuangzi is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 49.9% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick. Ban rate 1.1% — expect Zhuangzi to be removed in tryhard lobbies; have a backup in the same role.

faqs.question: What lane should Zhuangzi play?
faqs.answer: Zhuangzi is tagged Roaming in Camp export (Support, Tank). Help marksman crash wave, then rotate mid for picks. Return before Tyrant if your carry has no escape.

faqs.question: Best arcana and spells for Zhuangzi?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Fate arcana. Battle spell: Smite & Heal. Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive and jungle need.

faqs.question: Zhuangzi or Kaizer — which is better?
faqs.answer: Zhuangzi vs Kaizer (Tank, Tier S): Kaizer is 1.6% pick / 51.4% WR. Kaizer wins 1.5% more often globally. Choose Zhuangzi when you need Roaming identity; choose Kaizer for Clash Lane comfort.

faqs.question: Should I ban Zhuangzi?
faqs.answer: Yes in tryhard queues — 1.1% ban rate. Deny if enemy first-picks Tank.
